mechanical_transport_correction.only_change: Use the same pinned global-stock-data Yahoo chart endpoint and parsing semantics with explicit UTC period1/period2 instead of range=max.
mechanical_transport_correction.gate: HTTP 200, chart result present, raw OHLCV plus adjclose present, meta.dataGranularity exactly 1d, dates within the frozen interval, at least 252 complete sessions where listing history permits.
mechanical_transport_correction.chunking: Forbidden unless this single explicit-period request mechanically fails due a documented Yahoo length limit; no chunking is preregistered otherwise.

inherited_input_contract.raw_universe: Frozen Eastmoney total-market-cap response gives exactly 52 security lines and 50 normalized companies.
inherited_input_contract.multi_class: Before broader materialization, for each of two duplicated companies choose higher median raw close times volume over latest 60 complete common explicit-period Yahoo daily sessions; exact tie uses ascending ticker.
inherited_input_contract.final_universe: Exactly 50 companies and 50 selected stock lines; current-universe survivorship/look-ahead bias is explicit.
inherited_input_contract.price_scope: Exactly final 50 plus SPY and XLG from 2015-01-01 through 2026-07-22; Stooq cross-check only, no fusion or third source.
inherited_input_contract.crosscheck: Every canonical symbol must have at least 98% overlapping raw closes within 0.5%; no unresolved canonical symbol.

central_data.writer: quant_system.data.writer.append_rows with existing lock and transaction
central_data.publication: Validate all 52 symbols in staging, isolated-copy append/replay/conflict test, exact backup, then one bounded canonical publication; no partial symbol publication.
central_data.postwrite: Exact append receipt plus symbol/date/row counts, duplicates, nonfinite, coverage, source hashes, DB identity/SHA, WAL and openers.

strategy_after_central_ready.selection: Top10, hold through rank15, equal 10%, long-only, no leverage.
strategy_after_central_ready.benchmark: Same-date qualified current-Top50 equal weight; SPY/XLG diagnostic only.
strategy_after_central_ready.pass_gates: Base CAGR excess >1pp; Sharpe >= benchmark; MDD shortfall <=5pp; stress excess >0; turnover <=200%; at least two positive relative subperiods among 2016-2019, 2020-2022, 2023-latest.
